
GhostBSD desktop variant images (x86_64):

| Release         | x86_64 |
|-----------------|--------|
| 26.1-xfce       |  ✅    |
| 26.1-gershwin   |  ✅    |

These are the community XFCE image (`26.1-xfce`) and the community GNUstep
"Gershwin" preview (`26.1-gershwin`). The default `26.1` image (MATE) is listed
in the main table.
